reasoning: The PCI DSS control 3.1.2 focuses on ensuring data protection through lifecycle management and backup strategies. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster state and secrets, is backed up properly. Additionally, secrets and persistent volumes used by pods should have backup policies in place to ensure data recovery. Ingress controllers, which manage external access, should also have backup configurations to maintain availability and security settings.
title: Requirement 3.1.2
